name: Fugro N.V.
summary: Fugro N.V. provides geo-data information through integrated data acquisition, analysis, and advice for oil and gas, infrastructure, renewables, nautical, and other industries. The company engages in the determination of soil composition through cone penetration testing, as well as the acquisition of soil samples and related laboratory testing; and mapping of the seabed, and geological features and hazards using non-invasive techniques, including the related interpretation and visualization. It also provides geo-consulting and general-purpose navigation charts; and environmental, meteorological, and oceanographic measurement services. In addition, the company offers positioning signals and services, construction support, monitoring and forecasting services, and remote systems technology, as well as inspection, repair, and maintenance services. Further, it provides material testing and geo-consulting services, as well as asset integrity solutions, such as monitoring, analysis, and modelling for clients in the electrical power business, railroads, roads, and oil and gas infrastructure. The company serves in Europe, Africa, the Americas, the Asia Pacific, the Middle East, and India. Fugro N.V. was incorporated in 1962 and is headquartered in Leidschendam, the Netherlands.
